_comment: Per-call diarization metadata, keyed by call id (the calls/<id>.md basename). Only calls that need speaker fixing appear here. 'split' is the Zoom label that conflates two+ people on one connection; 'enroll' maps each real voice to one or more clean reference spans (START-END in seconds or [h:]m:s) used to attribute that label's cues. Calls absent from this file are passed through with their original Zoom labels.
